data.title: D.I.System Co., Ltd. Reports Increased Sales and Stronger Financial Position
data.description:
TipRanks Black Friday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

An update from D.I.System Co.,Ltd. ( (JP:4421) ) is now available.

D.I.System Co., Ltd. reported a 5.7% increase in net sales for the fiscal year ending September 30, 2025, reaching 7,222 million yen. The company also saw improvements in operating and ordinary profit, with a notable increase in comprehensive income by 11.7%. The equity ratio improved to 52.6%, reflecting a stronger financial position. The company announced a dividend increase to 27 yen per share, indicating confidence in future growth. The forecast for the next fiscal year anticipates a 10.1% rise in net sales, though a slight decline in profit attributable to owners of the parent is expected.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:4421) stock is a Buy with a Yen1073.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on D.I.System Co.,Ltd. stock, see the JP:4421 Stock Forecast page.

More about D.I.System Co.,Ltd.

D.I.System Co., Ltd. is a company listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange, operating in the technology sector. The company focuses on providing IT solutions and services, with a market emphasis on innovation and technological advancement.

Average Trading Volume: 6,724

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: Yen2.8B

data.title: 29Metals Awards $253 Million Gossan Valley Mining Contract to Byrnecut
data.description:
TipRanks Black Friday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

29metals Ltd. ( (AU:29M) ) has provided an announcement.

29Metals Limited has awarded a four-year underground mining contract to Byrnecut Australia Pty Ltd for the Gossan Valley mine at Golden Grove. This contract, valued at $253 million, is expected to enhance operational synergies and production flexibility by sharing resources across the Golden Grove operations. The Gossan Valley project is anticipated to begin ore production by the end of 2026, providing a higher-grade ore source and potentially extending mineral resource estimates.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:29M) stock is a Hold with a A$0.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on 29metals Ltd. stock, see the AU:29M Stock Forecast page.

More about 29metals Ltd.

29Metals Limited is a company operating in the mining industry, primarily focused on the extraction and production of metals. The company is involved in projects such as the Golden Grove mining operations, which include the Gossan Hill and Scuddles mines.

Average Trading Volume: 4,505,991

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$597M

Learn more about 29M stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Suzuken Co ( (JP:9987) ) has issued an announcement.

Suzuken Co., Ltd. announced the completion of a share repurchase, acquiring 187,900 common shares for approximately ¥1.09 billion through the ToSTNeT-3 system. This move is part of a broader strategy to maintain a flexible capital policy in response to changing business conditions, with a total of 3,116,400 shares repurchased so far, amounting to ¥17.59 billion.

data.title: 3D Energi Confirms Gas Discovery at Essington-1
data.description:
Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

3D Oil Limited ( (AU:TDO) ) has provided an announcement.

3D Energi Limited, operating in the energy sector, has confirmed a natural gas discovery at the Essington-1 exploration well in the offshore Otway Basin. This discovery was validated by successful recovery of gas samples from the Waarre C and Waarre A reservoirs, supported by drilling observations and preliminary petrophysical data. The company plans further testing to assess the commercial viability of the discovery, which could significantly impact its operations and stakeholder interests.

More about 3D Oil Limited
